sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa bek hong phel thei hi
Keimah inah Na kiang ka beel hi
Na sipha tawh hong sawp in
Na kiangah hong om sak tawntung in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khau banginah keimah hong hen in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Dam takin keimah lam hong hilh tan
Cikmah hunin lamkhial nawn lo ding,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sih ding hun hong tun mateng
Vantung innpi nuam sung tun mateng
Nang kong up na'ng khang sak in
Topa tawh kikhen nawn lo dingin.
